title: Egil's Saga: The Lay of Sonatorrek (After His Son's Death)
description: The Lay of Sonatorrek (After His Son's Death)
introduction: The Lay of Sonatorrek (After His Son's Death)

translation.text: I find it hard to lift my tongue, the steelyard of song-craft. Now is the poet's craft no easy matter. Hard it is to bear the loss of a son.
